description.value:
A curved cavalry sword as elegant as it is deadly. The saber's slight flex and razor edge let it turn aside attacks and deliver lightning counterstrikes â€” masters who dual wield them become engines of relentless offense.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Finesse, Melee d6, Slashing
BasicOne-Handed, Finesse, Melee d8, Deflect, Keen
MasterOne-Handed, Finesse, Melee d8, Deflect, Keen â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkAdd d4 to Deflect rolls. While wielding two sabers, when you reduce an enemy to 0 HP you regain your reaction immediately.

rmeData.masterPerk: Add d4 to Deflect rolls. While wielding two sabers, when you reduce an enemy to 0 HP you regain your reaction immediately.
